name: Bath Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together until well combined.
2. Use cookie cutters to shape the mixture into cookies.
3. Bake at 350°F for 10-12 minutes, ensuring they are not overbaked.
4. Allow the cookies to cool completely before storing them in decorative containers.
5. For use: Place 1-2 "cookies" in your bath and turn off the lights to relax.
